creator: william.a@carrel.org
text:
Created attachment 251891
net-im-gotosocial-update-to-v0.16.0.patch

Moves the port forward to 0.16.0.

Sorting pkg-plist with all the additions to %%WWWDIR%% has unfortunately resulted in a lot of churn.

This does _not_ have the port level fixes in Mina Galić's https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=278386, but does move the port forward to 0.16.0.
